author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented RNNCell, LSTMCell, GRUCell (single-step cells) and RNN (multi-layer vanilla RNN). RNNCell supports tanh/relu nonlinearity. LSTMCell returns (h', c') tuple. GRUCell implements the standard 3-gate equations. RNN supports num_layers, batch_first, dropout. All compose through autograd — no manual backward needed. Tests verify shapes and gradient flow. 3380 total tests pass.
